<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List system-level API tokens"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1beta1/system/api-tokens"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



List system-level API tokens. Returns a Kubernetes SecretList
resource containing heavily redacted Secrets.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
